title: Toast Functions
description: Adds extended control over Toasts: position, animation, sound customization, and more.
body:
# Everything About Toasts.

```
 This mod allows you to modify several aspects of Minecraft's default Toast
```





 This mod allows you to modify all the basic animations of Minecraft vanilla toasts, it allows you to change their position, their duration, remove the background making it invisible, choose a custom sound when it appears, and activate a queue that shows them to you in succession in case you get more than one at the same time, you can also control the status of all the configurations, to change all this the "ModMenu" mod is required.

# Version 1.21.4 will no longer be supported or updated.
#
